title: Create Mod Ultimate
description: This is a new way of Create Mod. A more advanced version of Create Mod that we all know and love.
body:
![C.M.U Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dtj4b8Th/images/362ecec42c01e763d910d593f8c7f8a7a0e5d69f.png)



![Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3Pyd5APK/images/7bc888e6c3e16699829a6fd8c8d53435d4ca4760.png)


Create Mod Ultimate is a mash of new and old Minecraft mods that will create a new experience. This Modpack is perfect for a quick mod pack that can be added to with a click of a button. We want to give the user an advanced experience that will change how Minecraft as a game feels. 

This Modpack includes around 30+ create Mod addons with more as time goes on. It also adds performance mods that will give the player a great experience, We want any player even with a low-power computer to run and play the game. 

We have tested this mod pack on many different types of computers to make sure that players will be able to play with friends. 

The Mod will add New blocks and additions that can produce new and regular Minecraft materials at fast paces. 

Mods included

* Create Mod 

* Create Sifting

* Create ore excavation 

* Create Steam 'n' Rails

* Create Slice & Dice

* Create: Dreams & Desires

And Much more...
